objective: Create a unified long-format monthly drought input dataset spanning historical and future periods on the authoritative rozvidrought-datasets grid.
method_summary: Confirmed the authoritative operational grid from rozvidrought-datasets.
Proved the old 80x70 raster template did not match the authoritative 175x153 grid.
Built a reusable raster alignment function targeting the authoritative grid.
Aligned historical core variables (t2m, d2m, pet, sm) into the new grid.
Backfilled missing early historical months for t2m, d2m, pet from existing NetCDF files.
Aligned future CMIP6 corrected rasters for ssp245, ssp370, ssp585.
Mapped future tas into the expected t2m naming convention.
Verified proxy variables ndvi and tws were still on the old grid, then aligned them too.
Built a source registry and pivoted monthly raster-path registry.
Built an authoritative spatial cell index and flattened rasters into one long-format parquet dataset.
important_notes: No raw data downloads were repeated.
The main change was spatial standardization onto the package grid.
Historical ndvi and tws begin later than 198001 due to source-data availability, not processing failure.
Future scenarios are structurally complete for all six variables.
